sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, info String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv, value FROM test_data WHERE value - (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data WHERE id > 1) > 0;
SELECT id, (extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv) - (value / 2) FROM test_data WHERE kv['age'] != NULL;
SELECT id, value, kv['height'] FROM (SELECT id, extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv FROM test_data) AS result WHERE value - 150.5 BETWEEN 10 AND 50;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, value, extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv FROM test_data WHERE id > 1;
SELECT AVG(value) - (SELECT SUM(value) FROM temp_data WHERE kv['height'] IS NOT NULL) AS difference FROM temp_data;
CREATE TABLE multi_data (col1 String, col2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col1;
SELECT md.col1, md.col2, td.kv FROM multi_data md JOIN (SELECT id, extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv FROM test_data) AS td ON md.col2 - td.value > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, (extractKeyValuePairsWithEscaping(info) AS kv) FROM test_data) AS derived_table GROUP BY kv['age'] HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
